name: Notional amount schedule amount—Leg 1
description: These data elements describe the notional amount schedule of Leg 1 in terms of each schedule period’s notional amount applicable in the period. It is reported as each period’s notional quantity amount multiplied by the period’s price or strike price.
format: A number of a variable number of numerals, including a number of numerals after the decimal point
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for certain Action types and not reported for other Action types.
Required if the asset class of the UPI that is reported is the interest rate asset class, and the value of the ‘Notional Schedule’ attribute of the UPI that is reported is not equal to ‘Constant’.
valueRules: The first period of a schedule is reported with Item 24—Notional amount—Leg 1 as the amount prevailing in that period.
The default value of ‘all 9s’ is an allowable value for Notional amount schedule amount—Leg 1.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
